title: bulbine latifolia var. latifolia
intro: Bulbine latifolia var. latifolia, also known as the orange or burn jolly bush, is a succulent plant species belonging to the Asphodelaceae family. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Bulbine latifolia var. latifolia include the treatment of wounds, burns, and skin irritations, as well as the relief of sunburns, insect bites, and minor cuts. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as infusions, ointments, and creams, to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health issues.
